experience.title: experience
experience.description:
As a passionate developer from Hyderabad, India, I have experience building diverse projects ranging from blockchain security solutions to full-stack web applications. My work spans across Rust, TypeScript, Python, and modern web frameworks.

I specialize in Data Science, blockchain technology (ZK-proofs on Starknet), and building developer tools that solve real-world problems.

hard-skills.title: hard-skills
hard-skills.description:
My technical arsenal includes:

Languages: Rust, TypeScript, Python, JavaScript
Frameworks: React, Vue.js, Node.js, Express, Next.js
Tools: Git, Docker, Linux, Vite, Tailwind CSS
Specialties: Data Science, ZK-Proofs, Blockchain Security, CLI Tools, Full-Stack Development

soft-skills.title: soft-skills
soft-skills.description:
I bring strong problem-solving abilities and a passion for continuous learning. I thrive in collaborative environments and enjoy tackling complex technical challenges.

My approach combines analytical thinking with creative solutions, whether I'm building anti-cheat systems or crafting elegant developer experiences.

bio.title: bio
bio.description:
About me
I am Abdul Khader, a student and developer from Hyderabad, India, with a deep passion for Data Science and software engineering. I love building tools that make a difference - from terminal utilities written in Rust to blockchain security solutions on Starknet.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or working on my next innovative project.

interests.title: interests
interests.description:
I am constantly learning and exploring new frontiers in technology. My interests include:

Data Science & ML: Analyzing data patterns and building intelligent systems
Blockchain: ZK-proofs, smart contracts, and decentralized applications
Developer Tools: CLI utilities, keyboard automation, and productivity tools
Linux & Open Source: Contributing to the community and sharing knowledge

education.title: education
education.description:
I am currently pursuing my studies in Computer Science at a university in Hyderabad, India. My academic journey complements my practical experience in software development.

I believe in hands-on learning and have built over 10+ projects spanning various technologies, from Rust-based CLI tools to full-stack web applications with React and Node.js.

coding.title: coding
coding.description:
Beyond professional development, I enjoy coding for fun! I love participating in hackathons, contributing to open-source projects, and building side projects that solve everyday problems.

Some of my favorite personal projects include LAN-TUI (a terminal UI for network scanning), kbrd (a keyboard utility tool), and ZK Anti-Cheat (a revolutionary blockchain-based anti-cheat system).

gaming.title: gaming
gaming.description:
I am a passionate gamer who appreciates both competitive and story-driven games. Gaming has inspired many of my projects, particularly my work on anti-cheat systems.

I enjoy games that push technical boundaries and explore innovative mechanics, which often sparks ideas for my own development work.

1.title: _portfolio-website
1.description: macOS GUI-style portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Features interactive desktop environment with multiple apps.

2.title: _lan-tui
2.description: Terminal UI for LAN scanning built with Rust. A powerful network diagnostic tool with an intuitive terminal interface.

3.title: _kbrd
3.description: Keyboard utility tool written in Rust for advanced key mapping and automation.

4.title: _zk-anticheat
4.description: World's first FPS with non-invasive ZK anti-cheat on Starknet. Revolutionary blockchain-based security.

5.title: _kindle-dashboard
5.description: A Kindle reading dashboard with data visualization and reading analytics.

6.title: _chat-agent
6.description: A simple chatbot using Node.js, Express, and OpenAI API for intelligent conversations.
